title: NM's ancient Chaco culture threatened by Trump administration
description: A federal scoping period ends April 7 which could result in new oil and gas drilling near New Mexico's Chaco Culture National Historical Park. The Department of the Interior opened a weeklong public comment window April 1 on plans to revoke

title: Ancient ocean extinction happened in stages, not all at once - Earth.com
description: Ancient ocean extinction happened in stages, not all at once Earth.com

title: Misidentified Triassic fossil turns out to be its own species
description: A previously misidentified Triassic cynodont has been confirmed as a new species, revealing a surviving lineage of early mammal relatives.

title: Ancient ocean extinction happened in stages, not all at once
description: A new study reveals that a major cooling event 34 million years ago caused staggered marine extinctions, not a single global collapse.

title: Ancient 500ft Tsunami Tore Oahu Apart and Left a Trail Bigger Than Manhattan (Video)
description: The Nu’uanu Slide was a submarine landslide some one million years ago, one of the largest in history, which split Oahu in two and created a monstrous...
